---
title: "Home"
site: workflowr::wflow_site
output:
  workflowr::wflow_html:
    toc: false
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: inline
---

## RESOLVE: Serum Proteomics

### PreSSc

1. [PreSSc Synovitis vs. No Synovitis](PreSSc_Synovitis.html)
2. [PreSSc Arthritis vs. SSc Arthritis](PreSScArthritis_vs_SScArthritis.html)

### RESOLVE

1. [Analysis Types: Binary vs. Continuous](RESOLVE_SSc_Skin_Regression_Analysis.html)
2. [Pathway Enrichment Analysis (Analysis D)](RESOLVE_AnalysisD_PathwayEnrichment.html)
3. [Correlation with Disease Severity](RESOLVE_BaselinemRSSCovariate.html)

### ILD Onset

1. [Identification of Deregulated Proteins](SSc_ILD_Onset_Analysis_Clean.html)
2. [Pathway Enrichment Analysis](SSc_ILD_Onset_Pathway_Enrichment.html)
